trade.summary: Moderate bilateral trade. Switzerland exports pharmaceuticals, chemicals, machinery, and luxury goods. Mexico exports auto parts, agricultural products, and manufactured goods. An EFTA-Mexico FTA is in force.

diplomatic.summary: Cordial diplomatic relations. Both countries cooperate in multilateral forums. Switzerland provides consular services and has historically offered diplomatic support for Mexican nationals in some contexts. Switzerland's development cooperation includes some Mexico-related programs.

military.summary: No military alliance or significant defense cooperation. Switzerland's neutrality precludes formal military ties. Minimal interaction.

financial.summary: Swiss multinationals (Nestlé, Novartis, Roche) have significant operations in Mexico. Swiss banks provide financial services to Mexican corporations and high-net-worth individuals. Bilateral investment is moderate.

energy.summary: Very limited direct energy trade. Switzerland has supported Mexican renewable energy projects through development finance institutions.

scientific.summary: Modest scientific cooperation in biodiversity, agriculture, and life sciences. Swiss and Mexican universities maintain some exchange programs. Joint publications growing slowly.
